title: Crispy Prawn Salad
description: A refreshing salad featuring succulent prawns, crispy elements, and a hint of citrus.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, and red onion.
2. In a separate pan, cook crispy bacon over medium heat until golden brown.
3. Remove bacon from heat and let cool completely.
4. In a separate pan, add prawns and cook over medium-high heat until pink and cooked through.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together citrusy dressing ingredients.
6. Add cooked prawns to the salad and top with crispy bacon, crumbled.
7. Drizzle citrusy dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
